entry.name: 런타임
covered_facts: expanded legacy runtime wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
내 기기 daemon facts on a runtime settings surface are reached through device-bound daemon detail policy, while explicit selected-agent daemon access remains agent-bound
legacy runtime frame variants do not create route forks

direction_loop.top_down: A revived runtime-detail rule from this legacy frame updates the current runtime settings policy/API entry first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: Implementation evidence about 내 기기 daemon detail stays on the device-bound daemon contract; selected-agent daemon detail stays on the agent-bound daemon contract unless product changes the current UI section.
